refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a matrix r of correlation coefficients calculated from an input matrix X whose rows are observations and whose columns are variables. The matrix r = corrcoef(x) is related to the covariance matrix c = cov(X) by r(i,j) = c(i,j) / sqrt(c(i,i) * c(j,j)). TODO : return p-values

refsection.title: Examples
